title: canarium caudatum
intro: Canarium caudatum, also known as the 'Pili nut tree', is a tropical evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Canarium caudatum include its seeds, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, and its bark, which is used to treat fever and skin conditions. The health benefits of Canarium caudatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic. Canarium caudatum is often prepared into herbal remedies such as oil, extract, and powder for various medicinal purposes.
